---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "tiledb_healthcheck"
namespace: "Query"
description: "Checks if a provided location can be queried as a TileDB-SOMA database"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `tiledb_healthcheck`  
Namespace: `query`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/query/tiledb_soma_healthcheck)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/query/tiledb_healthcheck)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/query/tiledb_healthcheck/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/query/tiledb_healthcheck).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/query/tiledb_healthcheck/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument group

### Input database

Open a TileDB SOMA database by URI.


|Name          |Description                                             |Attributes                                        |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input_uri` |If specified, a URI containing the TileDB-SOMA objects. |`string`, required, example: `"s3://bucket/path"` |
|`--s3_region` |Region where the TileDB-SOMA database is hosted.        |`string`, required                                |

## Authors


  * Dries Schaumont [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/DriesSchaumont) [{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4389-0440) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dries-schaumont) (author, maintainer)
